codeReview.summary: Current HEAD no longer matches the existing pass report. The reviewed commit only reseeded static reference data after runtime startup and replaced Bun-incompatible test mock helpers; it did not implement the broader compatibility-series aggregate/freshness hardening that the report claims. Since current HEAD separately normalized 400 validation envelopes in `src/http/errors.ts`, the old report's statement that Zod errors still emit `{ error: 'invalid_request', details }` is now stale. The existing report must therefore fail as inaccurate against both the commit diff and current repository state.

issues.description: The existing review report is materially inaccurate: it references broader chart/range, aggregate, and freshness hardening work that is absent from commit `ddf7f6ebdf5fa7218d943a813f714245b99bd354`, whose diff only touches `src/app.ts`, `tests/compare-coingecko.test.ts`, and `tests/integration-live-data.test.ts`.

The existing report's shared-state observation claiming `src/http/errors.ts` still emits `{ error: 'invalid_request', details }` for Zod validation failures is no longer true on current HEAD. `src/http/errors.ts` now returns `{ error: 'invalid_parameter', message }`, and current tests/assertions in `tests/invalid-params.test.ts` and `tests/app.test.ts` reflect that normalized envelope.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The feature was reviewed under `compatibility-hardening-worker`, but the recorded commit/handoff evidence is actually about a narrow parity-fixture restoration plus Bun mock compatibility fix. The skill expects endpoint-parity, invalid-parameter, or compatibility-surface hardening work with representative manual verification; this mismatch suggests the feature-to-commit attribution in mission state/review artifacts is unreliable.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `compatibility-hardening-worker/SKILL.md` describes audit/invalid-param/report work. Commit `ddf7f6ebdf5fa7218d943a813f714245b99bd354` only changes `src/app.ts`, `tests/compare-coingecko.test.ts`, and `tests/integration-live-data.test.ts`, while the current feature handoffs in the mission for compatibility hardening are for `parity-audit-and-invalid-param-coverage` (worker sessions `b54c01b5-01d5-4899-bbd2-2a6276c16d26` and `b04bc47c-c086-4087-8ba0-d00fa467d789`).

sharedStateObservations.observation: The existing scrutiny review artifact became stale as current HEAD evolved, but there is no documented mission/shared-state rule for refreshing earlier scrutiny reports when later commits invalidate factual statements inside them.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Existing review file still says Zod validation errors use `{ error: 'invalid_request', details }`, but current `src/http/errors.ts` returns `{ error: 'invalid_parameter', message }` and related tests now assert that shape.

summary: Review fails because the existing scrutiny report is no longer accurate. The cited commit `ddf7f6ebdf5fa7218d943a813f714245b99bd354` only restored post-runtime seeding/search rebuild and adjusted Bun mock usage, while current HEAD has also changed validation-envelope behavior, making the old report's findings stale.
